sfx.name: WHOOSH
sfx.reason: Transition whoosh right before the mesa redonda reveal — marks the shift from atmosphere to discovery.

sfx.name: CHIME
sfx.reason: Soft chime at the reflective turn — 'A veces lo mejor está donde menos lo esperas.' Positive resolution.

notes: 2 SFX for minimal narration. Light touch — WHOOSH for the reveal transition, CHIME for the reflective close. 6.4s spacing between effects.
